channel.title: video on Le Cahier
channel.description: Recent content in video on Le Cahier

item.title: Embedding video
item.description: I’ve just read this article about embedding YouTube videos using this simple blogdown function: blogdown::shortcode("youtube", "P3aGk_Gwqjw") I think I will never cease to be amazed by R developers. The possibilities are truly endless now. PS: “Electro swing”. Check it out on YouTube. Thank me later.
